creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
>A patch is committed.  Please try the latest ports tree and let me know 
>if it works or not.  Thank you.

I cannot build it.
soobj/gp_unix.o etc are not relocatable.
The following patch should be put as files/patch-src:unix-aux.mak :
--- src/unix-aux.mak.orig	2008-02-29 17:13:08.000000000 +0900
+++ src/unix-aux.mak	2008-05-07 12:55:36.000000000 +0900
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@
 UNIX_AUX_MAK=$(GLSRC)unix-aux.mak
 
 # -------------------------------- Library -------------------------------- #
+CFLAGS_SO= -fPIC
 
 ## The Unix platforms
 
@@ -35,16 +36,16 @@
 $(GLOBJ)gp_unix.$(OBJ): $(GLSRC)gp_unix.c $(AK)\
  $(pipe__h) $(string__h) $(time__h)\
  $(gx_h) $(gsexit_h) $(gp_h)
-	$(GLCC) $(FONTCONFIG_CFLAGS) $(GLO_)gp_unix.$(OBJ) $(C_) $(GLSRC)gp_unix.c
+	$(GLCC) $(FONTCONFIG_CFLAGS) $(CFLAGS_SO) $(GLO_)gp_unix.$(OBJ) $(C_) $(GLSRC)gp_unix.c
 
 $(GLOBJ)gp_unix_cache.$(OBJ): $(GLSRC)gp_unix_cache.c $(AK)\
  $(stdio__h) $(string__h) $(time__h) $(gconfigd_h) $(gp_h) $(md5_h)
-	$(GLCC) $(GLO_)gp_unix_cache.$(OBJ) $(C_) $(GLSRC)gp_unix_cache.c
+	$(GLCC) $(CFLAGS_SO) $(GLO_)gp_unix_cache.$(OBJ) $(C_) $(GLSRC)gp_unix_cache.c
 
 # assume all Unix platforms support unbuffered read
 $(GLOBJ)gp_stdia.$(OBJ): $(GLSRC)gp_stdia.c $(AK)\
   $(stdio__h) $(time__h) $(unistd__h) $(gx_h) $(gp_h)
-	$(GLCC) $(GLO_)gp_stdia.$(OBJ) $(C_) $(GLSRC)gp_stdia.c
+	$(GLCC) $(CFLAGS_SO) $(GLO_)gp_stdia.$(OBJ) $(C_) $(GLSRC)gp_stdia.c
 
 # System V platforms other than SVR4, which lack some system calls,
 # but have pipes.
